questions.question: In Ephesus, what did many who practiced sorcery do after believing?
Who started a riot in Ephesus because Paul's teaching was threatening the silver shrine business?
The seven sons of Sceva successfully drove out evil spirits using the name of Jesus.
The evil spirit answered, 'Jesus I know, and Paul I know, but who are _____?'
The crowd in the theater shouted for about two hours, 'Great is _____ of the Ephesians!'
